overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a vibrant medieval village on a sunny day. The character walks through meadows with grazing cows, enters a house porch, circles around the building past a woodcutter, and crosses a stone bridge while passing villagers.

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass past grazing cows toward a village path

notable_agents.action: brown cow grazing in the meadow
black and white cow standing near the dirt path

entered.detail: brown dairy cow grazing in tall grass with red flowers
black and white cow standing near the dirt path
stone wall of a village building with wooden door and shutters
wooden cart with barrels parked beside the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit meadow with lush green grass and wildflowers. Geralt walks past two grazing cows toward the edge of a medieval village, passing a stone building and wooden cart along a dirt path.

events.description: ascending stone steps and entering the covered porch of the red house

agents.ego_description: walking along the village path and climbing stone steps into a house porch

notable_agents.action: villager woman in yellow dress walking with a small child

entered.detail: blue painted half-timbered house with exposed wooden beams and ivy
red plastered stone house with arched doorway and stone foundation
stone steps leading up to the house entrance porch

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow village path between traditional half-timbered houses. He passes a woman and child before ascending stone steps into the covered porch of a red stone house, transitioning from open air to a shaded entrance area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered porch and garden path around house

events.description: exiting the shaded porch into bright sunlight
turning right around the corner of the house

agents.ego_description: exiting the house porch and walking around the building past a woodcutter working near logs

entered.detail: stone archway with ivy-covered columns connecting the buildings
wooden shed with stacked logs and a workbench

segments.scene_description: Geralt exits the covered porch into bright sunlight, passing through a stone archway. He circles around the house past a woodcutter working by a woodpile shed, returning to the open dirt path with views of distant village buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: village main road leading to stone bridge

events.description: ascending the cobblestone bridge over the water

agents.ego_description: walking through the village center and ascending the stone bridge, passing various villagers

notable_agents.action: child running across the bridge ahead
villager in straw hat and red pants walking ahead

entered.detail: cobblestone bridge with wooden railings crossing a small waterway
low stone wall lining the village path with sunflowers behind it
tall yellow sunflowers growing in a garden bed along the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along the main village road lined with stone walls and sunflowers, passing several villagers. He approaches and begins ascending a cobblestone bridge, with views of distant mountains and the village continuing on the other side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, sunlit meadow into the heart of a medieval village, eventually ascending a stone bridge toward a distant mountain range. It begins in a lush field of wildflowers and grazing cows, following Geralt along a dirt path past a wooden cart toward the village outskirts. As the camera moves deeper into the settlement, the open landscape narrows into a path between half-timbered houses before transitioning from the bright exterior into the shaded porch of a red stone building. The scene then shifts back into the sunlight as Geralt exits through a stone archway and circles past a woodcutter at a woodpile shed, returning to the main road lined with sunflowers and stone walls. Finally, the camera follows him past several villagers and onto a cobblestone bridge, where the view opens up to reveal the sprawling village and far-off peaks.
